title: [DEPRECATED] TrulyTweaks
description: This mod is no longer being actively worked on. - TrulyAussie
body:
TrulyTweaks is a mod full of a big amount of small things, and a small amount of big ones. The mod features things like recipe changes and additions, for example smoking rotten flesh to leather, as well as a few items to aid you on your modding journey.

## TrulyTweaks is now compatible with other mods!
### Currently, these mods are supported:
- _Create, by Simibubi_

TrulyTweaks is currently still going through development. If you would like to suggest a feature, such as a new item or a mod for compatability, please DM TrulyAussie (trulyaussie) on discord. Thank you!
